prompt:
A system maintenance health report printed on clean paper, clipped to a slim clipboard beside a small single-board computer cluster in soft focus. The page shows a structured checklist layout with status icons and short lines, but all text is intentionally unreadable and generic.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 with a near-future maker lab aesthetic: soft cinematic lighting, tidy cables, no logos, no readable text, no overlays. Center the clipboard page so it reads as “health report” instantly.
